message:
fix(runtime): Complete PyValue switch statements for VM-specific types

Add handling for all new VM-specific PyValue variants (dict, code, function,
builtin_fn, iterator, range, exception, generator) to:

- repr.zig: valueRepr() switch for string representation
- int_convert.zig: pyToInt() error message switch
- type_ops.zig: isSubclass() - fix @hasDecl on primitive types
- object.zig: isFalsy() and eql() for truthiness/equality

This fixes compilation errors when PyValue union was extended with
VM-specific types during the AOT/VM infrastructure unification.

Tests passing: int_literal, longexp, binop
